name: logistics supervisors at freight brokers managing 5–15 delivery routes/day tool
description: For logistics supervisors at freight brokers processing 5–15 delivery routes/day, route deviations cause late deliveries. We provide real-time tracking instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or phone calls.
target_audience: logistics supervisors at freight brokers managing 5–15 delivery routes/day
problem_solved: inability to monitor and respond to route deviations in real-time
